Package edu.bu.pas.uno.moves

Class Move

java.lang.Object
edu.bu.pas.uno.moves.Move
public final class Move extends Object
A class representing a move in the game.

  • Method Details

    • getPlayerIdx

      public final int getPlayerIdx()

    • getCardToPlayIdx

      public final int getCardToPlayIdx()

    • getNewColorIfWild

      public final Color getNewColorIfWild()

    • applyEffects

      public final void applyEffects(Game game)
      A method to apply the effects of this card to a Game. Note that this does not actually make an opponent draw cards/etc because the opponent gets to respond. This relies on Card.applyEffects(edu.bu.pas.uno.Game) to function will mostly set the new Color of the game.

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object

    • createMove

      public static final Move createMove(Agent agent, int cardToPlayIdx, Color newColorIfWild)
      A factory method to create a Move object.
      Parameters:
      agent - The Agent making the move
      cardToPlayIdx - The index of the Card to play in the current player's hand
      newColorIfWild - If the selected card is a WILD or WILD_DRAW_FOUR then the player needs to select a new Color
      Returns:
      The Move object

    • createMove

      public static final Move createMove(Agent agent, int cardToPlayIdx)
      A factory method to create a Move object. DO NOT CALL THIS IF THE CARD YOU SELECT IS A WILD
      Parameters:
      agent - The Agent making the move
      cardToPlayIdx - The index of the Card to play in the current player's hand
      Returns:
      The Move object
